csv_grid_extent.note: Measured from S5P sample window; S2 uses same grid_id/lat-lon

verdict: Sentinel-2/5P are now tabular CA-grid CSVs (~413k rows/file) with Hive partitions. S2 years on GCS: [2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025]. S5P years on GCS: [2025] (still sparse). Gap counts — S2 items missing=6, S5P month gaps=108. See missing_for_team.md.
